member.name: T:Prime.FunctionalService.CtvSettings
member.summary: Groups the fixed settings related to Ctv. These are the settings that are not related to the functional test object itself.

member.name: P:Prime.FunctionalService.CtvSettings.CtvPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of pins to capture.

member.name: P:Prime.FunctionalService.CtvSettings.Tail
member.summary: Gets or sets the tail of the CTV stream to capture. Example: if this is set to 10, and the plist execution captures 100, the `FunctionalService` will drop the first 90, returning only the last 10 bits.

member.name: T:Prime.FunctionalService.Factory
member.summary: Factory implementation.

member.name: T:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings
member.summary: Groups the fixed settings related to failures. These are the settings that are not related to the functional test object itself.

member.name: T:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehaviorMode
member.summary: Options for how to continue plist/patgen execution when the specified maximum number of failures have occurred.

member.name: F:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehaviorMode.ExitPListOnFail
member.summary: The current burst is allowed to complete but the next burst is not executed

member.name: F:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehaviorMode.AbortOnFail
member.summary: An attempt is made to abort patgen immediately. This is not compatible with KeepAlive plists.

member.name: F:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehaviorMode.ContinueOnFail
member.summary: Plist execution continues (without capturing any additional failures).

member.name: F:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehaviorMode.ReturnOnFail
member.summary: PList will evaluate fails at the pattern boundaries and return through the plist PostExec content.

member.name: F:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehaviorMode.Default
member.summary: This will be the default mode depending on the other capture settings.

member.name: P:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.TotalCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets Number of total failures to capture. The service will use the lower value between this and capture capacity available for the given plist defined by the hdmtOS.

member.name: P:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.PerPatternCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum failures to capture per pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.PatternNameCounterIndexes
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a tuple id.

member.name: P:Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings.ExecutionMaxFailBehavior
member.summary: Gets or sets the behavior when the maximum number of failures to capture has been reached.

member.name: M:Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalService.CaptureFailuresStopOnFirstFailedPatternBuilder(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.FunctionalService.FailureSettings,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates new functional test builder object for plist execution with capturing fail data. This test will stop execution on the first failing burst. Only failures of the first failing pattern will be returned by this object. Recommended when ReturnOn option is specified over the PList.
member.param: Sets the settings of how many failures to capture.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: Thrown when plist, LevelsTc or timings are invalid, or if the totalCaptureCount is equal to 0.
member.returns: A builder for the ICaptureFailureTest interface.
